sections: Copy this file to data/teacher_sections.csv and keep that live copy UNTRACKED (do not commit it).
Identity comes from the LMS: it verifies the Google/Firebase sign-in and hands us an already-verified
(email, role). There are no passwords here and none anywhere else in this repo.
This file answers the one question the LMS role cannot: WHICH sections a teacher may see.
A teacher email with no row here is DENIED (never guessed). Add the row, then they get access.
sections = ;-separated labels exactly as scripts.demo_backend.section_of_class emits them,
e.g. English.03;English.04 — a label typo silently yields an empty cohort, so copy them exactly.
Students need no row: their roll is read from the email localpart (<name>_<roll>@islorg.com).
Admins need no row either: they are configured as admin emails by the future API task.
Uncomment and correct the rows below — the owner must confirm each real address.
